findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "analyze_sql" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Analyze Postgres SQL/migrations for destructive operations, locking risk, correctness traps (NULL handling that silently returns wrong results), anti-patterns, …

name: get_policies
description: Return the custom org policy set currently stored for your Pro key — the same rules analyze_sql enforces on top of the built-ins. Read-only; returns an empty list if none are set. Use set_policies to change them.
